notes: Core mechanics work (movement, jumping, climbing, barrels, hammer) but the level layout lacks authentic DK feel with only 6 flat/slightly-sloped girders, no proper multi-screen structure, and the stage clear condition (reaching y<130) is awkward; barrel physics are somewhat erratic and the visual representation is very primitive with basic rectangles/circles rather than recognizable sprites.
Visuals are quite good and capture the arcade feel, but a logic flaw in the climbing code prevents Mario from climbing down ladders, severely impacting playability.
The build is stable and recognizably Donkey Kong, but core mechanics are simplified/inaccurate with questionable ladder/platform logic and overall mediocre gameplay fidelity.
